mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, version_desc_cn, version_desc_en, version_code, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_version_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pageSize,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT id, app_id, version_desc_cn, version_desc_en, version_code, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_version_t WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT id, app_id, version_desc_cn, version_desc_en, version_code, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_version_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version_code = #{versionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT id, app_id, version_desc_cn, version_desc_en, version_code, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_version_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_version_t (id, app_id, version_desc_cn, version_desc_en, version_code, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{versionDescCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionDescEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_app_version_t SET version_desc_cn = #{versionDescCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version_desc_en = #{versionDescEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version_code = #{versionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_version_p_t (id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{propertyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'default', 1, 'system', NOW(3), 'system', NOW(3))
